parameters.query:
SELECT e.id::text AS escalation_id, e.conversation_id, e.reason, e.notified_at,
       t.name AS tenant_name
  FROM escalations e
  JOIN conversations c ON c.id = e.conversation_id
  JOIN tenants t ON t.id = c.tenant_id
 WHERE e.status = 'notified' AND e.assigned_agent IS NULL

SELECT c.id AS conversation_id, c.last_activity_at, c.customer_email,
       t.name AS tenant_name
  FROM conversations c
  JOIN tenants t ON t.id = c.tenant_id
 WHERE c.status = 'needs_human'

INSERT INTO events (conversation_id, type, detail)
VALUES ($1, 'sla_realert', jsonb_build_object('escalation_id', $2::text, 'waited_minutes', $3::int, 'tenant', $4::text))
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
RETURNING conversation_id,
          detail ->> 'escalation_id'          AS escalation_id,
          (detail ->> 'waited_minutes')::int  AS waited_minutes,
          detail ->> 'tenant'                 AS tenant_name

parameters.text: ={{ `:hourglass_flowing_sand: *SLA breach — ${$json.tenant_name}*\n` + `Escalation unclaimed for ${$json.waited_minutes} min (SLA ${$env.SLA_MINUTES} min) — one-time re-alert.\n` + `Claim it: ${$env.CONSOLE_BASE_URL}/app/inbox/${$json.conversation_id}` }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO events (conversation_id, type, detail)
VALUES ($1, 'workflow_error', jsonb_build_object('node', 'Slack SLA Re-Alert', 'message', $2::text))

WITH moved AS (
  UPDATE conversations
     SET status = 'abandoned'
   WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'needs_human'
   RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO events (conversation_id, type, detail)
SELECT id, 'abandoned', jsonb_build_object('by', 'wf-o', 'idle_hours', $2::int)
  FROM moved
RETURNING conversation_id

INSERT INTO events (conversation_id, type, detail)
VALUES (NULL, 'digest_sent', jsonb_build_object('date', to_char(now(), 'YYYY-MM-DD')))
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
RETURNING id

SELECT t.name                              AS tenant_name,
       coalesce(f.total, 0)                AS total_conversations,
       f.deflection_rate                   AS deflection_rate,
       coalesce(v.conversations_24h, 0)    AS conversations_24h,
       coalesce(o.open_escalations, 0)     AS open_escalations,
       coalesce(g.top_gaps, '')            AS top_gaps
  FROM tenants t
  LEFT JOIN v_funnel f ON f.tenant_id = t.id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT tenant_id, count(*) AS conversations_24h
      FROM conversations
     WHERE created_at > now() - interval '24 hours'
     GROUP BY tenant_id
  ) v ON v.tenant_id = t.id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT c.tenant_id, count(*) AS open_escalations
      FROM escalations e
      JOIN conversations c ON c.id = e.conversation_id
     WHERE e.status IN ('open', 'notified', 'assigned')
     GROUP BY c.tenant_id
  ) o ON o.tenant_id = t.id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT tenant_id,
           string_agg(theme || ' (' || frequency || ')', ' · ' ORDER BY frequency DESC) AS top_gaps
      FROM (
        SELECT tenant_id, theme, frequency,
               row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id ORDER BY frequency DESC) AS rn
          FROM gap_clusters
      ) ranked
     WHERE rn <= 3
     GROUP BY tenant_id
  ) g ON g.tenant_id = t.id
 ORDER BY t.name

SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM users         WHERE created_at > now() - interval '24 hours') AS trial_signups_24h,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM premium_leads WHERE created_at > now() - interval '24 hours') AS premium_leads_24h,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM premium_leads)                                                AS premium_leads_total
